description: Two Sisters – A captivating journey into the unexplored beauty of Assam and Meghalaya, often called the “Two Sisters” of North East India. From Assam’s vast tea gardens, Kaziranga’s one-horned rhinos, and the mighty Brahmaputra River to Meghalaya’s living root bridges, crystal-clear rivers, misty waterfalls, and Asia’s cleanest village, this trip is a perfect mix of culture, adventure, and nature. Together, these two states offer a refreshing escape where every turn reveals breathtaking landscapes and soulful experiences.
name: TWO SISTERS
